title: acer palmatum subsp. matsumurae
intro: Acer palmatum subsp. matsumurae, also known as the Japanese maple subsp. matsumurae, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acer palmatum subsp. matsumurae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
